economic_mechanism: Monthly institutional and benchmark sector reallocations may be implemented over multiple sessions, so a liquid sector ETF that is already the 63-session relative-strength leader, remains above its 126-session trend, and leads the cross-sectional median materially may continue upward and outperform its same-date sector peers for another trading month.
candidate_or_family_scope: Exact MONTHLY_SECTOR_LEADER_CONTINUATION_BULL_CALL_35D_V1 / SECTOR_ALLOCATION_RELATIVE_STRENGTH_CONTINUATION on the frozen nine-original Select Sector SPDR panel; completed month-end 63-session leader with positive return, close above SMA126, and at least five-percentage-point lead over the panel median; next-close entry, 20-session exit, same-date equal-weight eight-nonleader control, 10-bps underlying hurdle, chronological 60/40 train/sealed holdout, and zero option pricing. Conditional future one-lot 30-45 DTE $2-wide bull-call debit spread only: capital_fit_usd=200, planning structural max_loss_usd=200 before debit slippage/closing friction, max_lots=1.
falsifier: Close the exact family if the chronological first 60% has fewer than 60 signals or ten signal years; any chronology, month-end, window, overlap, population, holdout-seal, option-pricing, or strict-JSON violation; leader mean after 10 bps <=0.50%; leader positive frequency <55%; paired excess versus equal-weight nonleaders <0.30%; paired-excess circular three-date-block LB90 <=0; worst-decile leader return <-8%; or the nonleader control is equal or better.

strategy_advancement.summary: The exact sector-allocation relative-strength continuation mechanism failed six frozen economic/risk gates in 102 train signals across 17 years and remains closed at F0. No F1, F2, L1, living candidate, quality leader, capital seat, registry, paper, shadow, arm, broker, funding, or live authority was earned.

search_information.summary: The wake added and exercised a reusable train-only monthly dynamic-leader lab with fixed nine-sector population, completed month-end to next-close chronology, non-overlapping 20-session windows, same-date nonleader specificity control, deterministic circular-block uncertainty, sealed chronological holdout identity, strict JSON, source hashes, deterministic cache replay, and fail-closed option/capital labels. It decisively found anti-edge rather than a survivor.

useful_deltas.summary: Added a reusable train-only monthly sector-leader lab with fixed-panel validation, exact month-end/next-close chronology, non-overlap enforcement, same-date peer control, sealed holdout identity, strict JSON, and behavioral, boundary, positive, negative, and leakage controls.

The frozen 102-signal/17-year train population produced leader mean -0.130819% after 10 bps versus +0.732793% for nonleaders, paired excess -0.863612%, circular-block LB90 -1.455459%, leader hit rate 48.0392%, and worst-decile -9.375157%; six gates failed, so both canonical IDs close at F0 with the 69-signal holdout unread and option pricing absent.

Quarantined both canonical sector-leader IDs plus nearby same-panel formation, separation, SMA, hold, top-two, and rank-weight retunes; the sole NEXT requires a candidate factory to predeclare at least two independent non-quarantined mechanisms and exercise to exactly one named strategy decision in-wake rather than count scaffolding as progress.
